title: Created Pretty Pipes
description: Created Pretty Pipes is an Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Ellpeck with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.
body:
Created Pretty Pipes is my Third Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Ellpeck with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.


ALL textures credits go to the creators of both mod!


Needs Create to work!!


The Resourcepack modifies the original textures of the Pretty Pipes mod and adds new textures that fit better with Steampunk mods like create and Immersive Engineering.
